Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Class SqlParserOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.SqlParserOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
SqlParserOptions
public static final class SqlParserOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for SqlParserOptions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SqlParserOptions
    build()
    Builds the SqlParserOptions.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    collectSpans(boolean value)
    Whether to collect span information during parsing.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    defaultNullOrdering(String value)
    Default null ordering (e.g., "nulls_first", "nulls_last").
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    dialect(Dialect value)
    SQL dialect to use for parsing.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    enableIdentNormalization(boolean value)
    Whether to normalize SQL identifiers (convert to lowercase).
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    mapStringTypesToUtf8view(boolean value)
    Whether to map string types to Utf8View instead of Utf8.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    parseFloatAsDecimal(boolean value)
    Whether to parse floating-point numbers as decimal type instead of float64.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    recursionLimit(int value)
    Maximum recursion depth for the SQL parser.
    SqlParserOptions.Builder
    supportVarcharWithLength(boolean value)
    Whether to support VARCHAR with length specification.

  • Method Details

    • parseFloatAsDecimal

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder parseFloatAsDecimal(boolean value)
      Whether to parse floating-point numbers as decimal type instead of float64.

    • enableIdentNormalization

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder enableIdentNormalization(boolean value)
      Whether to normalize SQL identifiers (convert to lowercase). Default is true.

    • dialect

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder dialect(Dialect value)
      SQL dialect to use for parsing. Default is GENERIC.

    • supportVarcharWithLength

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder supportVarcharWithLength(boolean value)
      Whether to support VARCHAR with length specification.

    • mapStringTypesToUtf8view

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder mapStringTypesToUtf8view(boolean value)
      Whether to map string types to Utf8View instead of Utf8.

    • collectSpans

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder collectSpans(boolean value)
      Whether to collect span information during parsing.

    • recursionLimit

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder recursionLimit(int value)
      Maximum recursion depth for the SQL parser.

    • defaultNullOrdering

      public SqlParserOptions.Builder defaultNullOrdering(String value)
      Default null ordering (e.g., "nulls_first", "nulls_last").

    • build

      public SqlParserOptions build()
      Builds the SqlParserOptions.
